titleStmt.title: SII 23.125: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 125. (A.R. No. 125 of 1907.) Pāppāṉkuḷam, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Siddhajnāñēśvara temple—on the west wall of the temple kitchen Māṟavarman Kulaśēkhara: year 8

summary.p: This is dated in the 8th regnal year of the king who is probably the one who ascended the throne in A.D. 1268. The details of the date given which should fall in A.D. 1276 are however irregular since it is not possible for Dhanus, ba. 2 to combine with Śvāti as mentioned in the record. The inscription registers the sale of a village (?) called Mangalakkuḷam with its income and appurtenances, by the Ūrār (assembly) of Kaṟkuṟichchi alias Vikramapāṇḍya-nallūr in Muḷḷi-nāḍu, to the temple of Karuttarindu-muḍitta-Pāṇḍi-Īśuramuḍaiya-Nāyanār situated in Śēraṉaiveṉṟāṉtirumaḍaiviḷāgam for 3230 paṇam, exclusive of the land already sold by them to the temple in Aippaśi month for the purpose of a flower-garden and for forming a street. Reference is made to a previous mortgage of the lands to one Vikrama-Pāṇḍya-Śōḻakōṉār and their redemption now from the hands of his son Añjādaperumāṉ. The kārāṇmaikkāṇi (tenancy) of the lands is said to have been held by one Kāḷamēgaṉ Aḻagāṇḍār alias Nāyaṉār Gāṅgaiyar who was responsible for the collection of the kaḍamai (tax) from the temple treasury (for payment to the State ?). Among the boundaries are mentioned lands belonging to the temples of Piravari-Viṇṇagar-Emberumān in the 10th Chēri of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, of Bhagavati-Viṇṇagar-Emberumān at Vēḷārkuṟichchi and of Rājēndra-Viṇṇagar-Emberumān (in the same place ?).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulacekarate vaṟku yāṇṭu 8Āvatu taṉunāyaṟṟu 10 1 tiyati yum Aparapakṣattu tutikai yum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ Uṭaiyār tirunel veliyuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam
muḷḷināṭṭu ceraṉaiveṉṟāṉ tirumaṭaiviḷākattu Uṭaiyār karut tarintu muṭitta pāṇṭi Īccuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Āticaṇ ṭecuratevaṟku Innāṭṭuk kaṟkuṟicciyāṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiya nallūr Ūṟkku camainta Ūravarom vilaippiramāṇa
m paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷūr maṅkalakkuḷattukkup peru nāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻellai Irācarāyaccatuṟvetimaṅkalattup pat tāñcerip piravariviṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāṉa kuṭaṅkuḷattil mel
ellaiyil niṟkiṟa tiruvāḻikkallukkuḷ peṟṟa ve ku meṟku teṉ ṉellai kaṭaṉaiyāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melellai veḷārkuṟicciyil pakavativiṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Uṇṇilat toṭṭattil kiḻellaiyil niṟkiṟa tiruvāḻikkal
lukkum yinta Ūr pilāṟṟukkuṅ kiḻakku vaṭavellai Irācentira viṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāṉa tirumaṅkaiviḷākattil teṉellaiyil kkaṇ peṟṟa cevvaikkum veḷārkuṟicciyil pakavativiṇṇakar Emperu
māṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam perāyiramāṉa putukkuḷattuk kaṭaivayalil niṟkiṟa tiruvāḻikkallukkum tiruppaṭimaṅkalakkuḷattil nirkor vaikkum teṟkum nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa kuḷamum kuḷapparippum naṉceyum puṉceyum nattamum nattappā
lum meṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum teṟṟiyum Uṭumpoṭu Āmaitavaḻiyum miṉpaṭu paḷḷamum teṉpaṭu putampum cekkiṟai taṟi yiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārppāṭṭamum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa camattap piṟāptikaḷilum muṉṉāḷ Ittevaṟku
Eṭṭāvatu Aippaci mātam Innāyaṉār tirunantavaṉattukkum tiruvitik kummāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟut tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇikkuṭutta nilam nikki niṉṟa piṟāttikaḷ Eṟpeṟpaṭṭaṉavum nāṅkaḷ Uṭaiyapaṭi kaḷile caṇṭecuravilai
yāka viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ūrkkuc camainta Ūravarom Āticaṇṭecuvaratevaṟku Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭuttār ṭa kuḷamum kuḷapparappum naṉceyyum puṉceyyum nattappālum mum
kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum puṟṟun teṟṟiyum Uṭumpoṭu Āmaitavaḻiyum miṉpaṭupaḷḷamum teṉpaṭu putampum cekkiṟai taṟiyiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭār pāṭṭamum maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa camattap piṟāttikaḷum Emmilicaintu vilai niṟceyitta vilai
Ippaṇam muvvāyirattu Irunūṟṟu muppatukkum poruṭ cila vāvatu Ikkuḷam muṉṉāḷ Eṅkaḷ kaiyāl Oṟṟiyuṭaiya pi cokkaṉā rāṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiyac coḻakoṉāṟku Oṟṟaṟutta Oṟṟi Olaip paṭi mācaṉ kuḷikai
paṇam Āyirattukku Iva kaṭaippuṟattu mācānpaṇam Oṉṟukku Aṟu māvāka vaṭṭameṟṟi veḷḷi Āyirattu muṉṉūṟum Ikkuḷam Iva nāṅkaḷ Oṟṟivaittatāl caṅkai Eṟuvatukku muṉṟām viṟcaiyāl Itukku Arai Accā nilam
vikkarama pāṇṭiyac coḻakoṉār makaṉār Añcātaperumāṉ pakkal Oṟṟiyil cāramuṟi Iṭṭu vāṅ ṇam 2 1000 5 10- lmu Innāyaṉāṟku tirunantavāṉamum tiruvitiyumāyviṟṟa nilattukku nila viḻukkāṭṭukku nikkik kuṭutta
nikki yam Ivarkaḷ Oṟṟiolai vāṅkik kuṭuppatāṉamaikkum nāṅkaḷ Eṅkaḷperil Eṭṭātu kār viraikkaikkuk kuṭutta Uraṅkaḷ Āka śa3 100 2 10 30 Ippaṇam muvāyirattu Irunūṟṟu muppatum Innāya ṉār koyilukkut taṉmattukku pā
ḻakiya pāṇṭiyakkuḷakkiḻ nel ku yuṭaiyāṉ kāḷamekam Aḻa kāṇṭārāṉa nayaṉār kāṅkeyaṟkuk kārāṇmaik kāṇiyum kaṭamai Ikkaruttarintu muṭitta pāṇṭicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Amutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nittal nimantaṅkaḷukkumāka
Innāyaṉārk kāṅkeyar karuvukolakkāval nampi pakkalile paṟṟiyum kuṭuppittu poruṭcelavākac cātti viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa kuḷamum kuḷapparappum naṉceyum puṉ ceyum nattamum nattappālum meṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokki
ṉa kiṇaṟu puṟṟu teṟṟiyum Uṭumpoṭu Āmaitavaḻiyu miṉpaṭu paḷḷamun teṉpaṭu putampum cekkiṟait taṟiyiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārpāṭṭam maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa camattappiṟāttikaḷum nāṅkaḷ Uṭaiyapaṭiye caṇṭecuravilaikku viṟṟukkuṭuttu Ippaṟṟukku Ituvē vilaiyo
laiyum poruṭcelavolaiyum Āvutākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutipporuṭcelavolai kāṭṭavum kāṇavum kaṭavataṉṟi vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta Ippaṟṟukku nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇ
ṇikkoṇṭu Ippiṭipāṭṭiṉpaṭi Ippaṟṟukkaḷ Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa Iṟai kaḷum Eṅkaḷūr tantirikkaṇakkilum kuṭuttamaikkum Ippaṭikku canti llak kallilum cempilum veṭṭi vum Ippaṭi cammatittu caṇṭecuravilaiyāka
viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār karuttarintu muṭitta pāṇṭicuramuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyilil Āticaṇṭecuvarateva ṟku muḷḷināṭṭuk kaṟkuṟicciyāṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiya nallūrūṟku camainta Ūravarom
Ivai vikkiramaciṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivaiy Irāciṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu ciṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai katevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kumaṇatevaṉ taṟkuṟiyātaṉmaikku kuṟikkum
taṟkuṟi māṭṭeṟinteṉ nārāya Ivai kūttāṭuntevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai civallapapperaiyaṉ taṟkuṟikkum kallakāram ṟikkum taṟkuṟi māṭṭeṟinteṉ Ivai kūttāṭuntevaṉ Eḻuttu
Itu Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivai tantirakkaṇakku periyatevaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 23.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
